headline: GPT-5.5 outperforms predecessors on real coding benchmarks
body: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 has demonstrated measurable improvements over GPT-5.4 and competing models like Opus 4.7 across 56 real-world coding tasks from open source repositories. For healthcare AI, this matters because clinical documentation systems, EHR integrations, and algorithmic decision support tools increasingly rely on LLM-powered code generation and validation. The performance gains in real-world coding tasks suggest healthcare vendors can expect more reliable automation for custom workflow implementations and faster development cycles for compliance-heavy applications. Consulting teams should track these capability improvements when evaluating which model versions to standardize on for production healthcare deployments, especially as GitHub Copilot phases out older versions.
